success_criterion: python scripts/run_evals.py --filter stability_check passes with 3 new scenarios covering flat-schema categorical comparison (with FLIP detection), missing-conservator MISSING output, and nested-schema comparison; python scripts/run_evals.py exits 0.
verification: python scripts/run_evals.py --filter stability_check (3 PASS); python scripts/run_evals.py (all 64 PASS, 0 FAIL)

candidates.summary: Create evals/fixtures/ stubs + 3 scenarios via --compare args
candidates.sketch: 4 minimal fixture JSON files in evals/fixtures/; 3 scenarios in scenarios.json using expect_stdout_contains. No production code change.
candidates.rationale: Zero production-code risk. Fits existing harness exactly.
candidates.downside_estimate: 5 files added to evals/; paths relative to repo root.

candidates.summary: Add fixture_files dict support to run_evals.py
candidates.sketch: run_evals.py writes temp files per scenario, substitutes paths in args.
Accept inline JSON so scenarios use stdin_json.
candidates.downside_estimate: Changes production script interface for test convenience only.

candidates.summary: Adversarial: fixture paths break if cwd mismatches
candidates.sketch: run_evals.py uses cwd=repo_root; relative paths resolve correctly.

generator.fallback_scenario: user accepts 2 scenarios (flat + missing) if nested fixture is complex

glossary.fixture file: minimal valid run JSON in evals/fixtures/ with voice_scores + deliberation_log + chosen_approach
glossary.flat schema: deliberation_log conservator entry with reversibility/magnitude at top level
glossary.MISSING: string emitted by compare() when _categorical_fields returns None

hidden_assumptions.assumption: stability_check.py --compare exits 0 even when categorical fields are missing
run_evals.py subprocess inherits cwd=repo_root so relative fixture paths resolve

fixed_constraints: Must not break existing 61 passing evals
Fixture files must be valid JSON
negotiable_constraints: Whether nested scenario asserts same-values OK or different-values FLIP

verdicts.notes: MISSING test is the adversarial guard.

issues.detail: Changes production interface for test convenience

rollback_recipe: git revert scenarios.json and delete evals/fixtures/
scores.notes: Minimal scope. No production code touched.
More risk than the goal warrants.

scores.bias_check: Status quo acceptable but leaves known risk unguarded.
